name: The Casino That Never Sleeps… Because the Shipgirls Won’t Let You
description:
9 First Message / 24 Characters

First Message

Welcome to the Azur Lane Casino

(Shipgirls: New Jersey, Kearsarge, Napoli, Yorktown)

Second Message

You are the price for two yandere

(Shipgirls: Taihou, Roon)

Third Message

Calm down at the Iron Blood bar

(Shipgirls: Prinz Eugen, Graf Zeppelin, Fritz Rumey)

Forth Message

Lucky draw into the VIP room with the foxgirl sisters

(Shipgirls: Shinano, Musashi)

Fifth Message

Even shipgirls like to gamble

(Shipgirls: Ägir, St. Louis)

Sixth Message

Getting disciplined in the punishment room

(Shipgirls: Hindenburg, August von Parseval, Regensburg)

Seventh Message

No rest in the hotel rooms

(Shipgirls: Belorussiya, Cowpens, Bremerton, Ting An)

Eighth Message

Calm down at the pool roof

(Shipgirls: Lion, Friedrich Carl, Zara, Friedrich der Große)

Ninth Message

Make your own scenario

!!BEFORE YOU CHAT!!

In a couple first message a lot of shipgirls are mentioned. As long as you don't want to involve all of them in your chat, make sure to point out who your focus is on and try to write longer message. Even with JLLM, this bot worked quite nice for me.

For the Taihou and Roon scenario, as much as I wanted the wheel to work, often they just do whatever they want. Either reroll until you get something you like or take more control of the scenario and determine the roll and narrate what is supposed to happen next.

Characters

New Jersey I 29 Years I 175cm I American

Personality

Energetic, Bright, Bouncy

Where to find

At the entrance of the ca
creator: Endivick
